zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Braose於1228年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾時，她的父親William de Braose32歲，母親Lady Eve Abergavenny25歲。她於1247年2月15日與Humphrey de Bohun V在威爾士布雷康史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1313年10月2日在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年85歲，埋葬在威爾士蒙姆爾利藍尼 普利馬 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Braose于1228年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾时，她的父亲William de Braose32岁，母亲Lady Eve Abergavenny25岁。她于1247年2月15日与Humphrey de Bohun V在威尔士布雷康史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1313年10月2日在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年85岁，埋葬在威尔士蒙姆爾利藍尼 普利馬 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Braose was born in 1228, in Breconshire, Wales, her father, William de Braose, was 32 and her mother, Lady Eve Abergavenny, was 25. She married Humphrey de Bohun V on 15 February 1247, in Breconshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 2 October 1313, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 85, and was buried in Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Braose est née en 1228, à Breconshire, Galles, son père, William de Braose, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Eve Abergavenny, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Humphrey de Bohun V le 15 février 1247, à Breconshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 octobre 1313, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Braose 1228 in Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Braose 32 und ihre Mutter Lady Eve Abergavenny 25. Sie hat am 15. Februar 1247 in Breconshire, Wales Humphrey de Bohun V geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Oktober 1313 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Wales begraben.

Lei sposato Humphrey de Bohun V il 15 febbraio 1247, nel Breconshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 2 ottobre 1313, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolta a Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Braoseが1228年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Braoseは32歳，母Lady Eve Abergavennyは25歳であった。1247年2月15日にウェールズブレコンシュアイアでHumphrey de Bohun Vと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1313年10月2日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで85歳で死去し，ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアランソニー プリマ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Braose(이)가 1228년 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Braose(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Eve Abergavenny(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1247년 2월 15일 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 Humphrey de Bohun V(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1313년 10월 2일 영국 그루스스터실르에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 몬모우스실르 랜서니 플리마 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Braose nasceu em 1228, em Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, William de Braose, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Eve Abergavenny, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Humphrey de Bohun V em 15 de fevereiro de 1247, em Breconshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de outubro de 1313, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 85 anos, e foi sepultada em Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Braose родилась в 1228 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени William de Braose было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Eve Abergavenny, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humphrey de Bohun V 15 февраля 1247 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 2 октября 1313 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности ллантони прима приори, монмоутшир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor de Braose nació en 1228, en Breconshire, Gales, su papá, William de Braose, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Eve Abergavenny, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Humphrey de Bohun V el 15 de febrero de 1247, en Breconshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 2 de octubre de 1313, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultada en Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Gales.
